infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: A.EYE.ECHO needs microphone access to transcribe live speech into captions.
infoPlist.NSSpeechRecognitionUsageDescription: A.EYE.ECHO uses on-device speech recognition for live captioning.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: A.EYE.ECHO uses the camera for visual speaker identification via face detection.
